PLTF'S DECLARATION: SF HERIFF'S DEPT. WAS UNABLE TO SERVE THE DEFT. FOR THE 11/20/98 HEARING.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BIRCHARD, KYLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FISHER, DAVID $225.07 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $245.07, PLAINTIFF IS TO NEGOTIATE THE CHECK IN THE AMOUNT OF $31.81 GIVEN TO HIM BY DEFENDANT.
